mapper.sql: ID,DEVICE_IP,DEVICE_SSH_USR, DEVICE_SSH_PWD,REMARK,CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME,ENABLE_STATUS, CONN_STATUS,CREATE_USER, UPDATE_USER,NODE_ID,PORT, SCRIPT_VERSION,ARCH_TYPE,CPU_CORE, MEM_TOTAL
mapper.select:
WITH
RECURSIVE
TREE_DEVICE (ID, UPPER_ID, NODE_NAME, LEVEL) AS ( SELECT A.ID, A.UPPER_ID, A.NODE_NAME, A.LEVEL FROM T_DEVICE_NODE A WHERE A.ID = #{deviceNodeId} UNION ALL SELECT B.ID, B.UPPER_ID, B.NODE_NAME, B.LEVEL FROM TREE_DEVICE INNER JOIN T_DEVICE_NODE B ON TREE_DEVICE.UPPER_ID = B.ID )
SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(NODE_NAME ORDER BY LEVEL SEPARATOR '/')
SELECT LISTAGG(NODE_NAME,'/')WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY LEVEL)
FROM TREE_DEVICE WHERE LEVEL > 1

WITH
RECURSIVE
TREE_DEVICE (ID, UPPER_ID, NODE_NAME, LEVEL) AS ( SELECT A.ID, A.UPPER_ID, A.NODE_NAME, A.LEVEL FROM T_DEVICE_NODE A WHERE A.ID = #{deviceNodeId} UNION ALL SELECT B.ID, B.UPPER_ID, B.NODE_NAME, B.LEVEL FROM TREE_DEVICE INNER JOIN T_DEVICE_NODE B ON TREE_DEVICE.ID = B.UPPER_ID ) SELECT ID FROM TREE_DEVICE

SELECT D.ID,D.DEVICE_IP,D.ENABLE_STATUS,D.CONN_STATUS,D.NODE_ID, NULL AS DEVICE_AREA FROM T_DEVICE D INNER JOIN T_DEVICE_NODE DN ON D.NODE_ID=DN.ID
--筛选启用的设备 D.ENABLE_STATUS = '0'
D.ID=#{params.deviceId}
D.DEVICE_IP=#{params.deviceIp}
AND D.NODE_ID IN ( WITH
RECURSIVE
tree_device_node (id,upper_id) as ( select a.id,a.upper_id from t_device_node a where a.id = #{params.nodeId} union all select b.id,b.upper_id from tree_device_node inner join t_device_node b on tree_device_node.id= b.upper_id ) select id from tree_device_node)
SELECT T.ID, DEVICE_IP, DN.NODE_NAME AS DEVICE_HOME FROM T_DEVICE T INNER JOIN T_DEVICE_NODE DN ON T.NODE_ID = DN.ID WHERE ENABLE_STATUS = '0' AND CONN_STATUS = '0'

SELECT T.ID, T.DEVICE_IP, T.NODE_ID, NULL AS DEVICE_AREA, DN.NODE_NAME AS DEVICE_HOME, T.ENABLE_STATUS, T.CONN_STATUS FROM T_DEVICE T INNER JOIN T_DEVICE_NODE DN ON T.NODE_ID=DN.ID
T.DEVICE_IP=#{deviceIp}

SELECT OBJECT_ID,MONITOR_VALUES,JOB_MESSAGE,CREATE_TIME,ALARM_CONDITION FROM SYS_JOB_LOG
(OBJECT_ID,CREATE_TIME) IN( SELECT OBJECT_ID,MAX(CREATE_TIME) FROM SYS_JOB_LOG where OBJECT_ID = #{deviceId} GROUP BY OBJECT_ID) and ALARM_CONDITION in('3','4','5')
